pr.title: chore(review): Automated dependency risk assessment for loki chart 16.0.1 → 17.1.1 (PR #217)
pr.body:
Delivers the Renovate agent risk assessment for PR #217 upgrading the `ghcr.io/grafana-community/helm-charts/loki` OCI chart from 16.0.1 to 17.1.1.

## Findings

- **App version unchanged** — both chart versions ship Loki 3.7.2; this is a chart-only change
- **Breaking change in 17.0.0 is a non-issue here** — MinIO sub-chart was deprecated/hard-blocked (`minio.enabled: true` now fails chart render), but this deployment already uses external S3 via `observability-s3` secret
- **Verdict: Yellow / Merge after checks** — stateful workload, major chart bump, but no values migration needed for this config

## Skipped versions covered

| Version | Notable change |
|---|---|
| 16.1.0 | `ipFamilyPolicy`/`ipFamilies` on Service resources |
| 16.1.1 | HPA/KEDA zone-suffix bug fix |
| 17.0.0 | **[breaking]** MinIO deprecation enforced via chart validation |
| 17.0.1 | access-log-exporter image bump |
| 17.0.2 | Replica rendering fix when `replicas: null` |
| 17.1.0 | Workload template helpers for scalable components |
| 17.1.1 | Workload template helper for monolithic/SingleBinary (active mode in this repo) |

## Pre-merge checks flagged

- Confirm `minio.enabled` is not set anywhere in the config tree
- Watch Flux HelmRelease reconciliation post-merge
- Verify Longhorn PVC re-attaches on pod restart
- Spot-check S3 read/write path via Grafana log queries
pr.author: Copilot
